generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100PermanentMagnetMotor, SiemensSINUMERIK840D, MABIMAX100Gearwheel, MABIMAX100CycloidalGearbox
]

instance MABIMAX100PermanentMagnetMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical current (I_M) into torque (τ_M) for the first axis"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840D : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller providing position, speed, or acceleration inputs to the first axis"
]

instance MABIMAX100Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the gearbox of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) for the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMotorModel, AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkGearwheelModel, AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMotorModel, AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque (τ_M) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMotorModel, AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMotorModel, AASEnabler
]

instance SimulatedRMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkMotorModel
]

instance SimulatedRGDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkGearwheelModel
]

instance SimulatedROutDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkCycloidalGearboxModel
]

instance SimulatedRMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position (r̂_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedRMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Dashboard
]

instance SimulatedRGData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel position (r̂_G)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedRGDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Dashboard
]

instance SimulatedROutData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output position (r̂_out)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedROutDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Dashboard
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block and Internal Block Diagrams for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLMBSE
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulinkCycloidalGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SysMLMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation models of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulinkSimulationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data linkage and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASDataLinkageService
]

instance MQTTStream : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTDataStreamingService
]

instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of friction models and system status"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models in a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelComparisonInsight, MaintenanceRecommendationInsight, CalibrationRecommendationInsight
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for SysML structural modeling"
]

instance SimulinkSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for Simulink simulation models"
]

instance AASDataLinkageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for Asset Administration Shells data linkage"
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for MQTT data streaming"
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance ModelBasedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based control improvements to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterUpdateAction
]

instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static friction characterization from model comparisons"
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kinetic friction characterization from model comparisons"
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Viscous friction characterization from model comparisons"
]

instance FrictionModelComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from friction model comparisons used to enhance motion accuracy"
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization supporting human decision-making for maintenance"
]

instance CalibrationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization supporting human decision-making for calibration"
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control parameter updates based on friction model comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction exists as the system is a digital shadow with a one-way data flow from physical to virtual, as per Kritzinger et al. [32], where digital shadows do not push data back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time twinning with sensor data streamed via MQTT, enabling immediate processing and analysis of live measurements for friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of SysML models, Simulink simulations, AAS, MQTT data streaming, and dashboard visualization to create a unified digital shadow for friction analysis and motion control improvement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, continuously monitoring and modeling friction during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is validated by comparing simulated data (from white-box and black-box friction models) against measured reference data to quantify deviations, ensuring accurate friction identification for control improvement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standards used for system modeling and data integration."
]
